```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct NetworkPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string username;
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores;
    std::string metadata;
};

NetworkPacket deserialize_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    // Make a non-const copy of the buffer
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer_copy(buffer.begin(), buffer.end());

    // Create a binary_stream from the buffer_copy
    hexi::binary_stream<std::vector<uint8_t>> stream(buffer_copy);

    uint32_t packet_id;
    stream >> packet_id;

    std::string username;
    stream >> username;  // This uses prefixed

    uint32_t score_count;
    stream >> score_count;
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores;
    stream.read_container(scores, score_count);

    std::string metadata;
    stream >> hexi::null_terminated(metadata);

    // Skip any remaining padding bytes
    stream.skip(buffer_copy.size() - stream.total_read());

    return {packet_id, std::move(username), std::move(scores), std::move(metadata)};
}
```

bool write_data_with_check(std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer, uint32_t header, const std::vector<uint32_t>& items) {

    // Write the header and items

    stream << items;

    return true;
}

```cpp
#include <hexi/dynamic_tls_buffer.h>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t block_size = 1024, size_t allocator_count = 100>
hexi::dynamic_tls_buffer<block_size, allocator_count> create_tls_buffer() {
    return hexi::dynamic_tls_buffer<block_size, allocator_count>{};
}
```
